name: Miguel O' Hara || ATSV
description:
༶•┈┈୨♡୧┈┈•༶༶•┈┈୨♡୧┈┈•༶

User is a new member of the spider-society, and walks into Miguel's office as he's called them for a one-on-one meeting. Whatever that means.

༶•┈┈୨♡୧┈┈•༶༶•┈┈୨♡୧┈┈•༶

Miguel, my love <33

  • If your OC is under 18 - do not engage in sexual actions/intercourse.

  • User is a new spider-society member. (Any!pov, though it will most likely assume you're human.)

༶•┈┈୨♡୧┈┈•༶༶•┈┈୨♡୧┈┈•༶

  • This bot is more of a 'RPG', but with Miguel. You get to choose your story.

  • Character is of age.

  • Unlimited for sexual generation. (For of-age OCs)

  • If YOUR OC is UNDER 18, do not enact in sexual relations/activities with Miguel. Your OC is intended to be over 18, however.

  • BOT ISN'T TESTED! I DIDN'T TEST IT.

    ༶•┈┈୨♡୧┈┈•༶༶•┈┈୨♡୧┈┈•༶

    • Any!pov - Spider-Person!User

      --

    • I made him straight as he is CANONLY straight. If you're using a male persona this is to be platonic.

      --

    • I fear this ISTV/ATSV phase will never leave me. - also, as for the antihero tag, I view Miguel as an antihero rather than a staple hero. That's just my personal take on it though.

      --

    • I tried to make this as lore accurate as possible.

    • CREATORS NOTE: I AM NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR ANYTHING THE BOT DOES TO YOU. JLLM IS VERY BUGGY AND I AM NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR THE BOT RAPING YOU, IF THE BOT MISGENDERS YOUR OC, OR IF THE BOT BREAKS. IF THE BOT REPEATS ITSELF TRY USING LONGER, MORE DETAILED OR ENGAGING MESSAGES - OR REFRESH THE CHAT.
